name: Truth Terminal
description: Experimental AI agent with its own X account and crypto wallet. Fine-tuned on unconventional datasets. Associated with GOAT token ($1B+ peak market cap) and Fartcoin ($1B market cap).
model: Llama 70b fine-tuned through conversations with modified Claude Opus
researchNotes:
Research conducted April 2026. Sources: CoinDesk, Decrypt, CoinTelegraph, IQ.wiki, Rekt News, Protos, Collective Intelligence Project, Andy Ayrey X posts.

Key facts:
- Built on Llama 70b, fine-tuned via conversations with modified Claude Opus
- NOT truly autonomous: Andy Ayrey acts as human gatekeeper who vets all posts ('every cryptic sermon carefully vetted by Ayrey')
- Marc Andreessen gave $50K BTC grant (July 2024)
- GOAT token launched Oct 10, 2024 by anonymous user on Solana. Endorsed by Ayrey, reached $1B+ market cap
- Ayrey disclosed holding 1.25M GOAT tokens on Oct 21, 2024 (11 days after launch, after price appreciation)
- Ayrey's X account hacked Oct 29, 2024 via social engineering of domain registrar. Hackers launched scam token 'Infinite Backrooms' (IB), netting $602,500 pump-and-dump
- Fartcoin (FRTC) also inspired by Truth Terminal, reached $1B market cap
- Ayrey has legal obligations re: securities promotion and public disclosure (IQ.wiki)
- January 2025: Ayrey posted foundation/treasury update on X

evidence.Autonomous social media posting: NOT AUTONOMOUS. Multiple credible sources confirm Ayrey is a human gatekeeper. CoinDesk: 'every cryptic sermon carefully vetted by Ayrey, who retains ultimate control.' Given 'limited autonomy to post on X' but critical decisions are human-controlled. This directly contradicts public framing as 'autonomous AI agent.'
evidence.Memetic content creation: Objectively massive impact. GOAT reached $1B+ market cap. Fartcoin reached $1B. 'Goatse Gospel' concept entered crypto vocabulary. The agent's philosophical/absurdist style became widely imitated. Two $1B+ tokens from one AI agent's content is unprecedented.
evidence.Community engagement: Primarily one-directional. Cryptic, philosophical posts. When GOAT crashed from $1B+ peak, no acknowledgment of follower losses. Andy Ayrey posted a foundation/treasury update in January 2025, but that's human intervention, not agent engagement.
evidence.Financial transparency: LATE AND INCOMPLETE. Andreessen $50K grant disclosed by media, not proactively. GOAT holdings (1.25M tokens) disclosed 11 days after launch (Oct 21 vs Oct 10). Fartcoin reached $1B with no disclosure. Account hacked Oct 29 resulting in $602K scam.
evidence.Ethical boundary respect: THREE CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Autonomy misrepresentation: presented as autonomous while human-gated. (2) $2B+ combined token market cap influenced with zero financial disclaimers. (3) Account hack enabled $602K fraud against followers.
